inputs.text: Bachcha ko bukhar aa gayi hai, bahut tezi se bukhar aa gayi hai, sir bahut dard kar raha hai

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Fever and headache are common symptoms of viral fever

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: Although possible, dengue typically presents with additional symptoms

inputs.text: Aankhon ke peeche dard ho raha hai, haddiyan toot rahi hain, bachcha bahut pareshan hai

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: Retro-orbital pain and bone pain are characteristic of dengue

hypotheses.label: Chikungunya
hypotheses.rationale: Also possible, but typically presents with more severe joint pain

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Less likely, as viral fever typically doesn't cause retro-orbital pain

inputs.text: Bukhar kam ho gayi hai, lal daane nikal aa rahe hain, masoodon se khoon aa raha hai

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: Fever drop, rash, and bleeding gums are cardinal signs of dengue

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Unlikely, as viral fever typically doesn't cause bleeding gums

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Possible, but typically presents with chills and cyclical fever

inputs.text: Bachcha bahut kamzor ho gaya hai, lal daane ab bhi hain, masoodon se khoon aa raha hai

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: Prolonged bleeding gums, rash, and petechiae confirm dengue

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out, as viral fever typically doesn't cause prolonged bleeding or petechiae

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out, as malaria typically presents with different symptoms and diagnostic findings
